title: East Coast Railway – Junior Engineer – 4 Posts
shortInfo: East Coast Railway Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Junior Engineer(C&W). Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech, Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through East Coast Railway official website.

basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: East Coast Railway Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Junior Engineer(C&W). Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech, Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through East Coast Railway official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches, ITI/Act apprenticeship in the relevant trade, 10+2 Science

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for East Coast Railway Junior Engineer(C&W) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
